name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
2. Mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Gradually add the milk and egg, whisking constantly until the batter is smooth with no lumps.
4. Transfer the batter to a piping bag or a large squeeze bottle with a small round tip.
5. Place a baking sheet in the preheated oven.
6. Carefully remove the baking sheet from the oven when it has reached the correct temperature (around 450°F).
7. Gently tap the bottom of the piping bag on the counter to release any air bubbles, then pipe batter into the hot oil until the basket is full.
8. Return the baking sheet with the piped batter to the preheated oven for 15 minutes at 450°F.
9. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F (175°C).
10. Continue cooking for another 15 minutes, or until the puddings are golden brown and puffed up.
11. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
